---
title: "xin chao (hi)! "
image: IMG_9026.JPG
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
---

I'm currently a rising senior studying Business, Economics, and Statistics and Data Science at Lawrence University. This website is the documentation of my life, including projects that I have worked on (updates to come!), and some side quests that I'm on. I'd love to meet new cool people with the same love for building products, communities, and art. My work lies on the intersection of data, design, and people. I care deeply about projects that surface the unseen, namely underrepresented communities, overlooked problems, stories that don't get told enough. 

Outside the classroom, I shoot and edit videos, and spend a lot of time thinking about how entrepreneurship, ethical innovation, and social impact can coexist! If you're someone who geeks out over building products, creating communities, or just making things that are both useful and beautiful, I'd love to connect.

See more at [Life](life.html)!

---

### reach me at

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/tianaho/" target="_blank">
  <img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/simple-icons@v9/icons/linkedin.svg" width="30px" style="margin: 6px;"/>
</a>
<a href="https://github.com/tianaho801" target="_blank">
  <img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/simple-icons@v9/icons/github.svg" width="30px" style="margin: 6px;"/>
</a>
<a href="mailto:thuytien.qhh@gmail.com" target="_blank">
  <img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/simple-icons@v9/icons/gmail.svg" width="30px" style="margin: 6px;"/>
</a>
<a href="https://www.instagram.com/tiana_hooo/" target="_blank">
  <img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/simple-icons@v9/icons/instagram.svg" width="30px" style="margin: 6px;"/>
</a>
<a href="https://www.youtube.com/@TianaHo-u1d" target="_blank">
  <img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/simple-icons@v9/icons/youtube.svg" width="30px" style="margin: 6px;"/>
</a>
